title: Beesha baccifera
intro: Beesha baccifera, also known as Beech tree, is a deciduous tree native to the Himalayan region, characterized by its smooth grey bark and edible leaves. The health benefits of Beesha baccifera include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and promoting overall well-being.
